title: From supply shock to oil glut: IEA flags scale of demand destruction caused by Iran war
summary_full: The energy supply shock triggered by the Iran War has prompted the IEA to slash its global oil demand forecast.
summary_public: The energy supply shock triggered by the Iran War has prompted the IEA to slash its global oil demand forecast.

IR.label: neutral
